page: UpCloud PREMIUM-64xCPU-384GB is a high-capacity virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, running at a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz with shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing 6.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a bundled 500 GB local SSD for storage.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across multiple compute-intensive metrics. The server achieves top 10% placement in both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests, as well as PassMark CPU, extended instructions, encryption, and physics evaluations. Memory performance is mixed; while small-block cached read bandwidth ranks in the top 10%, large-block uncached read and write bandwidths place in the top 25%, and the overall PassMark memory score falls in the middle 50%.

This hardware profile is highly suited for database operations, as evidenced by its top-tier PassMark database operations score and strong Redis SET performance. It also demonstrates strong capabilities in static web serving and medium-model LLM inference prompt processing. Given the high resource density of 64 physical cores and 384 GB RAM on a shared CPU allocation, the server offers a cost-efficient profile for massive parallel processing, data compression, and memory-heavy workloads without the overhead of dedicated hardware.
description: UpCloud PREMIUM-64xCPU-384GB is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 64 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor at 2.0 GHz, paired with 384.0 GB of RAM and a local 500 GB SSD. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with shared CPU allocation, this server delivers top-tier compute performance, ranking in the top 10% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng benchmarks and PassMark CPU tests. While memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is excellent, large-block uncached memory performance remains moderate. The server excels in database operations, high-throughput static web serving, and data compression tasks, making it highly suitable for enterprise-grade database management, multi-threaded data processing, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: UpCloud PREMIUM-64xCPU-384GB is an x86_64 KVM virtual server featuring 64 AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and a 500 GB SSD, delivering top-tier database operations and multi-core compute performance.
meta_description: UpCloud PREMIUM-64xCPU-384GB features 64 AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and a 500 GB SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
tagline: A high-core virtual server featuring AMD EPYC processors and massive memory capacity for demanding database and parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 AMD EPYC 9575F physical cores on KVM hypervisor
384.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB per core
Top-tier multi-core CPU and database benchmark performance
Well-suited for database operations, data compression, and web serving
